name: My Precious
overview: Tian Tian, a veterinarian unexpectedly takes over her family's struggling pet hospital and meets the compassionate CEO, Shen Mi. Together, they rescue animals, overcome challenges, and establish a shelter, inspiring others to care for stray animals.

trailers.title: 当菁英总裁#黄子韬 遇见菜鸟院长#王鹤润 叮咚！是爱情来敲门~ |《甜蜜的你》CP篇预告 My Precious Official Trailer | MangoTV Drama
